title: Complete PCR Workflow with Thermocycler
author: Opentrons
description: Part 1 of 2: Master Mix Assembly Links: * [Part 1: Master Mix Assembly](./pcr_prep_part_1) * [Part 2: Master Mix Distribution and DNA Transfer](./pcr_prep_part_2) * [Part 3: Thermocycler](./thermocycler) This protocol allows your robot to create a master mix solution using any reagents stored in a 2 mL Eppendorf tube rack or a 2 mL screwcap tube rack. The master mix will be created in well A1 of the trough. The ingredient information will be provided as a CSV file. See Additional Notes for more details. --- You will need: * [4-in-1 Tube Rack Set](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/tube-rack-set-1) * [12-well Trough](https://www.usascientific.com/12-channel-automation-reservoir.aspx)
steps_raw: Part 1 of 2: Master Mix Assembly Links: * [Part 1: Master Mix Assembly](./pcr_prep_part_1) * [Part 2: Master Mix Distribution and DNA Transfer](./pcr_prep_part_2) * [Part 3: Thermocycler](./thermocycler) This protocol allows your robot to create a master mix solution using any reagents stored in a 2 mL Eppendorf tube rack or a 2 mL screwcap tube rack. The master mix will be created in well A1 of the trough. The ingredient information will be provided as a CSV file. See Additional Notes for more details. --- You will need: * [4-in-1 Tube Rack Set](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/tube-rack-set-1) * [12-well Trough](https://www.usascientific.com/12-channel-automation-reservoir.aspx)
Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support article.
Robot will transfer each reagent from its source to well A1 of trough in slot 3.
